verses.text: “Tua hun laitakin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘A masa-a bangin suangpeek nih seekin, mualtung ka kiangah hong pai in la, sing singkuang khat bawl in
A masa-a suangpeek na sukkhapte' tunga thute tua suangpeekte tungah ka gelh ding a, singkuang sungah tuate na koih ding hi,’ hong ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin singkha sing tawh singkuang khat bawlin, a masa-a bangin suangpeek nih ka seek a, ka khutsungah a peek nihte tawi-in mualtungah ka paito hi

Kikhop ni-in mei sung panin mualtungah Topa in note tungah hong gensa thupiak sawmte, a masa-a a kigelh bangin tua suangpeekte tungah amah in gelh a, tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah tua suangpeekte hong pia hi
Tua ciangin kihei-in mualtung panin ka paisuk a, ka bawlsa singkuang sungah tua suangpeekte ka koih hi. Topa in kei hong thupiak bangin suangpeekte tua sungah a om hi
(Beeroth Benejaakan panin Moserah-ah Israel mite zin uh hi. Tua lai-ah Aaron si a, tua lai munah kivui hi. Ama tangin a tapa Eleazar in siampi na sem hi
Tua lai panin Gudgodah-ah pai uh a, Gudgodah panin lui tuite a omna gam Jotbathah-ah pai uh hi
Tua hun laitakin Topa in, tuni dongin ama na a sem ding leh ama min tawh thupha a pia dingin Topa' mai-ah dingin, Topa' thuciamna singkuang a pua dingin Levi minamte a tuam koih hi
Tua ahih ciangin a sanggamte uh bangin Levi mite in tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin neilo uh a, Topa na Pasian un amau kiangah a gen bangin Topa pen amau' luah ahi hi
“A masa-a bangin sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung mualtungah ka om a, Topa in tua hunin zong ka thu hong ngai a, Topa in note hong susia nawnlo hi
Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amaute tungah piak dingin a pu a pate uh tungah ka kiciam leitangah pai-in a luah theihna dingun ding in la, na khualzin uh zomin mite mai-ah pai in,’ hong ci hi.
“Israel-te aw, tu-in, Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding, ama lampite tot ding, amah it ding, na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa note' Pasian' na sep ding
leh nomau' hoihna dingin tuni-a kong gen thupiaknate leh Topa' thukhamte zuih ding cih simloh, Topa na Pasian un note' tung panin bang dang hong kal ahi hiam
En un, vantung leh vantung a sangpente leh leitung leh a sunga om khempeuh pen Topa note' Pasian-a' ahi hi
Tua hi napi-in Topa in na pu na pate uh a itna lian mahmah ahih manin tuni-a mah bangin midangte khempeuh sangin amau' suanlekhakte hong teelzaw hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' thu mang un la, lungkhauh nawn kei un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh a lian, a vanglian, a kihtakhuai Pasian, angvan neiloin, sumgolh a lalo, pasian-te' Pasian, topate' Topa ahi hi
Amah in pa neilote leh meigong numeite-a' dingin thutang semin, peemtate itin an leh puan a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin peemtate it un; bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah peemta na hi uh hi
Topa note' Pasian na zahtak ding uh a, ama na semin, amah beelin, ama min tawh na kiciam ding uh hi
Amah pen nomau' phat ding ahi hi. Na mitte un a muhsa hih a lian a kihtakhuai nate note-a' dingin hong bawlsakpa pen na Pasian uh ahi hi
Na pu na pate uh mihing sawmsagih bek Egypt-ah paisuk uh a, ahi zongin tu-in Topa na Pasian un vantung aksi zahin note hong tamsak hi.
